name: ieee_v4_I5S
title: IEEE TrafficFlowBench v4 sample — I5S (3 days)
source: IEEE BigData Cup TrafficFlowBench v4 release (Caltrans PeMS derived)
timezone: local_naive (fake-UTC 'Z' suffix — strip, do not convert)

speed.description: DIVIDE BY 1.609 before any mph-based analysis

flow.description: divide by effective lanes for the per-lane contract

is_observed.description: 0 = imputed (a prior) — never calibrate on it

quality.imputation_rule: drop rows with is_observed == 0 before calibration

ordering.convention: milepost DECREASES downstream — use chain row order; states file is .csv.gz

caveats: 3-day sample: is_observed==0 never occurs here (full release has imputed cells)
QVDF calibration needs more days than the sample provides (n_fitted = 0 expected)
chain lane tags unreliable (lanes=1 tagged on a 12,000 veh/h station) — derive effective lanes from data
